summary: Great '80 performance with a smoking Scarlet > Fire, hot Althea and a tight Jack Straw closer, captured on an enjoyable but unspecified source.
review: The show is praised for its strong setlist – the Scarlet > Fire sequence rivals late‑70s heights, Althea delivers a scorching lead, and Jack Straw closes the first set with memorable energy. Reviewers note no major glitches and describe the recording as clean enough for ’80 aficionados, though the exact source (soundboard vs audience) isn’t identified.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive 4‑5 star reviews highlight standout performances and note only minor or no technical issues, indicating a strong show with good recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No major glitches reported; reviewers describe the tape as clean and enjoyable for '80 fans, but do not specify whether it is soundboard or audience.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
Estimated Prophet > Eyes of the World
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set builds nicely to a strong Jack Straw closer; second set highlighted by seamless transitions like Scarlet > Fire and an energetic Estimated > Eyes sequence.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Noted for letting loose on the Fire ending with powerful solo work.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland praised for melding smoothly with Jerry’s guitar.
